heroHeadline: RSF-SPLM-N Seize Kurmuk; Roseires Dam Threatened; Drone Wave Kills 500+ in March
heroSubtitle: RSF-SPLM-N alliance captures Kurmuk (Blue Nile), threatening Roseires Dam and Ed Damazin; SAF drones kill 30+ in two Lagawa strikes; RSF drones hit Ad Dabbah in northern Sudan; 16 massacred in El Fasher; new UN envoy Haavisto meets Burhan with no ceasefire; 2,000+ killed in 213 healthcare attacks since war began
footerNote: Data sourced from UN OCHA, UNHCR, WFP, OHCHR, WHO, ACLED, HRW, Radio Dabanga, Sudan Tribune, Reuters, Al Jazeera, MSF, Darfur24, AFP, and Critical Threats Project
